UK = Unknown CHAR 2 x x
M0740_PR_LAUNDRY (M0740) Prior Laundry Prior ability to do own laundry. 00 = (a) Able to independently take care of all laundry tasks; OR (b) Physically, cognitively, and mentally able to do laundry and access facilities, but has not routinely performed laundry tasks in the past (i.e., prior to this home care admission).
01 = Able to do only light laundry, such as minor hand wash or light washer loads.
